secret_safe_note: Contains ONLY sha256 digests + present flags for secrets. No raw secret value appears anywhere in this file.

anchor_commit.subject: docs(phase0): box-3 GPU fix + search-diagnosis RESOLVED (env artifact, not a bug)
anchor_commit.note: runtime code here == pre-initiative pipeline state; the review-readiness runtime changes begin at the NEXT commit 43214a2 (fix(audit_ir): make registry build lazy). This manifest anchors the pipeline BEFORE any initiative runtime change.

requirements_lock_sha256.note: sha256 of requirements.lock AS OF the anchor commit b6e8ef5 (1064 lines).

python_version.note: 3.11.10 is the pipeline's declared/target runtime. NOTE: the phase0 worktree shell interpreter observed at manifest-build time was CPython 3.10.12 (sandbox default python3); the pipeline target remains 3.11.10 and this discrepancy is recorded for the reviewer.

os_platform.uname: Linux 88a2cef7eb24 6.8.0-101-generic #101~22.04.1-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Feb 11 13:19:54 UTC x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

source_of_truth: src/polaris_graph/llm/openrouter_client.py (4-role architecture defaults; must equal config/architecture/polaris_runtime_lock.yaml — verify_lock asserts equality)
model_routing_config.env_override_note: In the live .env, PG_GENERATOR_MODEL is overridden to z-ai/glm-5.2 (differs from the deepseek code default). PG_SENTINEL_MODEL and PG_JUDGE_MODEL are NOT overridden in .env -> fall through to code defaults. All values above are NON-SECRET (model slugs) and recorded verbatim.

secrets.policy: any env var whose NAME matches KEY|TOKEN|SECRET|PASSWORD|CREDENTIAL. Recorded ONLY as {present, sha256(value)}. Never the raw value.

excluded_non_secret_matches.note: The following name-matched vars are NON-SECRET config (numeric flags / paths / a public GPG key id / token-budget knobs) and are therefore NOT digested as secrets.
vars: POLARIS_AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRY=86400 (seconds), POLARIS_CLOUD_TOKEN_PATH=state/cloud_tokens.json (path, not a secret), POLARIS_GPG_KEY_ID (public key id)

seeds.summary: No single global pipeline seed is declared for the acceptance run; fixed seeds are scattered in specific determinism-sensitive spots.
seeds.PYTHONHASHSEED: not set by the pipeline; content_deduplicator MinHash uses builtin hash() which is PYTHONHASHSEED-randomized across processes. Bench guidance (run_bakeoff.py) recommends PYTHONHASHSEED=0 for the dedup bench, but the acceptance harness does NOT pin it.
seeds.acceptance_harness_seed: acceptance_outline_agent.py declares no random seed; it passes anchor_seed=True to run_live_retrieval (a retrieval-scope anchor flag, NOT an RNG seed). Effective harness determinism: none declared.

acceptance_harness.single_scenario: cd /home/polaris/wt/phase0 && python acceptance_outline_agent.py --only thin   # or: --only saturated
acceptance_harness.notes: Harness self-loads /workspace/POLARIS/.env (override=True), forces PG_OUTLINE_AGENT=1, and sets small turn/wall budgets (PG_OUTLINE_AGENT_MAX_TURNS=6, PG_OUTLINE_AGENT_WALL_SECONDS=420) by default. It is LIVE (hits real retrieval + LLM providers). Requires the declared runtime python (3.11.10).

test_suite.full_polaris_graph: cd /home/polaris/wt/phase0 && python -m pytest tests/polaris_graph/ -v   # per README.md:224
test_suite.default_collection: cd /home/polaris/wt/phase0 && python -m pytest   # pytest.ini: testpaths=tests, addopts=-v --tb=short
test_suite.deselect_live_slow_api: cd /home/polaris/wt/phase0 && python -m pytest -m 'not slow and not api and not live'
test_suite.notes: pytest.ini markers: slow, api, live (live tests opt-in via env e.g. PG_ENTAILMENT_LIVE=1, skipped by default). baseline pytest recorded as 8.4.1.

input_fixtures.acceptance_harness_fixtures: NONE (no static fixture files). acceptance_outline_agent.py has NO .json/.jsonl fixture inputs. Its seed evidence is bootstrapped LIVE via _bootstrap_seed() -> run_live_retrieval(); the two research questions (THIN: tirzepatide 15mg HbA1c efficacy + long-term CV safety; SATURATED: a narrow already-covered question) are hardcoded inline in the harness.
file_inputs_consumed: /workspace/POLARIS/.env  (via load_dotenv, override=True) — provides API keys + PG_* model routing
